warnings: Minor version upgrade from 14 to 15 — test application compatibility
PostgreSQL 15 changed default permissions on public schema

missing_on_target.name: aws_s3
missing_on_target.reason: AWS-specific extension — not available on Oracle Managed PostgreSQL
missing_on_target.action: Remove usage of aws_s3 functions and replace with Oracle Object Storage SDK

missing_on_target.name: pg_partman
missing_on_target.reason: Not available on Oracle Managed PostgreSQL
missing_on_target.action: Implement partitioning using native PostgreSQL 15 declarative partitioning

missing_on_target.name: timescaledb
missing_on_target.reason: TimescaleDB is not available on Oracle Managed PostgreSQL
missing_on_target.action: Migrate time-series data to Oracle-native solution or use plain PostgreSQL partitioning

differences.action: Increase max_connections on target or reduce connection pool size on application
Increase work_mem on target to match source for query performance
Set wal_level=logical on target — required for CDC replication to work

found.action: Replace rds_superuser role with appropriate Oracle Managed PostgreSQL roles
Replace IAM authentication with Oracle Cloud IAM or username/password auth

ssl.action: Enable SSL in application connection strings before cutover

summary.blocker_reason: 2 critical issues must be resolved before migration can proceed
